history.content:
<thought>
I am currently facing up (north). The goal is to the right and slightly ahead. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I must turn right to move to the right. The cell to my right is currently unknown, represented by '?'. I will move forward to explore that cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently facing right. The goal is to the left and slightly ahead. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn left to move up. The cell above me is currently unknown, represented by '?'. I will move forward to explore that cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
